review_title: Quality over Quantity
description: Peppertype uses a very capable and quality AI engine to write a very usable text without requiring much modifications for production use. This is a great feat achieved by the team as many companies fail to achieve this level of accuracy.
author: Rituparna M.
pros: Peppertype provides very relevant and accurate output for every feature it offers. Most important among them is the content rewriter. Not many AI tools get this content rewriting part right. I assume, it is one of the most difficult AI component to implement. Peppertype has got this one right. It matters to me a lot. I use peppertype along with another tool called CrawlQ. CrawlQ finds relevant content from net against my keywords. However, their content rewriter is not that great. So I leverage Peppertype instead to complete that part of the functionality. And so far, this strategy has been working great
cons: Peppertype offers much less templates compared to competition. For example, wordhero offers much more templates compared to peppertype. However, this is a case of quality over quantity. Many other tools may provide a lot more templates but peppertype provides extremely quality outputs for the limited set of templates it offers
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Phenomenal AI Content Generation Tool That Delivers Tangible Results - FAST!
description: Peppertype's outputs are certainly pleasing to me. It serves all my needs and helps me to generate quality content in less time, especially when I'm stuck.
author: Zach K.
pros: I have tried so many content generation tools such as Nichesss, CopySmith, Jarvis, Shortly.ai, etc., but Peppertype.ai has definitely become my favorite and go-to tool for content generation. A major reason is the wide range of content options available. There are currently 34 separate content generation options, from suggesting compelling bullet points, YouTube video descriptions, personal bios, blog introductions, or to assist in copywriting with the pain-agitate-solution or AIDA methods.
cons: Peppertype only lets you save generated content right now. However, I'm hoping Peppertype can save activity details as well so that the users can go back and see the past inputs used to generate content.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: One of the works experience Ever
description: One of the worst ever. To be honest, when I pay for a subscription I do respect our account actually works and, in case, I expect support to answer.
author: Stefano F.
pros: The platform itself is good. Algorythm ok.
cons: The support is just unexistant! For [sensitive content hidden] we purchased on Appsumo a lifetime license and suddenly after just 2 years they rebranded, and somewhat our account is not working anymore. They advertise on their website to contact support at the email on their footer but nobody is answering that email... we even contacted Appsumo and they tried to get in touch with them too but nothing just happened. They are a phantom company. You are on your own. BUY AT YOUR RISK !
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Excellent All-Around AI Content Tool
description: I really like using this platform! The interface is easy to use, the tool is very compelling and really saves me a lot of time. I use it mainly for blog ideas/expanders and product descriptions. But I also find that Quora Answers works very well.
author: Natapol S.
pros: I have been using Peppertype for a few months now and have seen them steadily improve. The UI /UX is beautiful and easy to use. The quality of the output is generally great. There are many modules that cover everything you need to write. And what I like most about Peppertype is that the outputs seem to come from the engine optimized and tuned by real content writers, not engineers. Overall, Peppertype is very pleasant to work with. It allows us to give enough input and choose a tone that is crucial for the quality and relevance of the results.
cons: Although Peppertype is very good overall, some modules and certain types of input sometimes filter out more irrelevant output than others. Also, there are some bugs and errors when I use languages other than English in various modules. The tool automatically detected the languages and gave good results in certain modules. In some modules the output was mixed with English.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Among some of the Best Ai writer, & it has a great Ui going for it
author: Adam K.
pros: There are various other writing assistants tools I use on a regular basis. Unfortunately, one could be said that most are strictly content curating tools and not exactly asisting me much on the creative side. I consider Peppertype to be among the best writing assistants available today. But this one is onpar with the rest of the tools I got from Appsumo, like Copysmith, Neuraltext, Contentbot, Frase, writesonic, etc. However, I noticed that Peppertype's content generation seems to be slightly natural, and better than the competitions - even though they are mostly based on the same GPT-3 technology.
cons: Each workpsace is an individual subscription. Would be great to have some kind of folder or workpsace feature for the various teams to store different content. As it is, things from Social meida team, HR department, PR, etc, are all in 1 place. THe current workplace is a solution, but I'd need to pay for the teams to have some kind of structure.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: To generate quality content pretty fast, Peppertype is a great option
description: In one word i have say, Peppetype helps me to save my time of writing marketing copies and generating content ideas. I can now easily find current trendy content idea, blog outline in quickly process, but the price for it very less in comparison to other similar product. writing YouTube description for my brand is very easy for me , since i was stared using Peppertype. Through I like to use more long form article , they should work on it.
author: Sefayet U.
pros: Peppertype has good interface and easy to learn and use option. For my marketing purpose it saves plenty of my times, by providing good quality content idea. It's very easy to write social media caption, in no time. For my YouTube channel, it helps me to write great description in no time, which saves me a lot of times. to create marketing content , only need to to input brand name, I can easily select type of input, definitely it comes in affordable price range with great help.
cons: Their is one thing , they should improve. I was searching for control the output number but, does not able to find, besides they should work on long form editor also.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The All-In-One Writing Tool — For Everyone
description: I'm not a copywriter by trade. Sure I was always decent at college essays and such, but writing just isn't my profession. I love Peppertype because I can focus on designing my client's websites and upselling them on copywriting later. I don't have to focus on creating bogus headlines or copy for my client's projects because Peppertype does it for me — and damn well.
author: Brian 📸 L.
pros: I love the content expansion tool. I can take small ideas and turn them into full-fledged blog posts in a matter of seconds. The pricing of Peppertype.ai is what really attracted me to the product — I've worked with other AI copy tools that cost nearly $100 per month and this creates just as good of copy, if not better. It's budget friendly, user friendly, and creates amazing content that I'm not afraid to put front and center on the websites I create for my clients.
cons: Peppertype is in its beginning stages and is still growing. While the technology is there, it is still lacking in some content types — this doesn't worry me as there is a Facebook group that the founders are incredibly active in and getting real-world feedback and suggestions from real users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A content generation tool that understands different niches
description: Peppertype is now my go-to content generation tool that reduced my article writing time from 3 hours to 30 minutes. It understands what I want to write which is a great feat. 80% of the generated content stays in the article and copy and I only have to work the remaining 20%.
author: Aashish P.
pros: I loved how they have divided the different sections of a blog and the content tool gives different content based on whether you need it for the intro, conclusion, or as an answer. Moreover, it understands what you need just by your text, keywords, questions, which makes it really good.
cons: I'd love if the same functionality is provided for languages other than English. I didn't quite find European and Asian language support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool that blows a lot of the other competitors out of the water
description: Great tool overall. Nice UI, very easy to use. I don't have many questions on how to use it because it's so intuitive already. I'm quite certain they will be around for a long time.
author: Joshua L.
pros: With the click of a button, you can create persuasive and highly converting copy. Our time is limited and we have high expectations when it comes to creating content. This is a time-saving and cost-effective solution for us. I use this tool to draft ads, emails, landing pages, and more. Any copywriter looking to improve their skills should consider using this tool.
cons: It doesn't generate long-form content very well, like in Shortly or Jarvis. The shortform outputs like AIDA or PAS aren't long enough to use useable in every scenario
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very well trained AI writer tool
description: Overall, I am super impressed with this tool. The quality of the AI output & the sleek UI create a great combination. I am sure it's going to be one of the best tool out there in this niche.
author: Nafiur R.
pros: The output of this tool is really impressive. And the speed of the output is just cherry on top. Almost all the outputs are usable & thus saves lot of time to generate awesome content quickly.
cons: The flow of generating long content could be much better. Although the UI is very fast, still there are a lot of in-between steps to create various parts of long content. It should have been a step-by-step process.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Highway to the success in AI writing
description: Peppertype.ai has proven to be an invaluable tool for me undoubtly. Any content creator, writer, blogger, or even design professional will be happy to try and buy it, I highly recommend it. I use it everyday to write engaging content for blogs, and even my website. I've also found that Peppertype.ai helps me stay focused and on task with my writing.
author: Anshul L.
pros: - Clean UI - Covers several niche - Great quality of generated contents with minimal after work - Focus on improvement - Public roadmap with user contribution - Backed by solid team and committed leaders
cons: - I would like to see features like content planner - Support may be a bit faster, but I am happy with the experience so far as its seldom that you would need to reach out to the support, and its still around 24 hours response time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An affordable AI Writing Tool with better future!
description: Peppertype’s inbuilt AI-powered software can be seen as a double-edged sword. Although it does a great job of editing and improving your work, it’s not perfect. Compared to other similar software such as Grammarly or Hemingway, the AI of Peppertype seems to be underdeveloped. Before you use any software to edit your work, make sure to check its reviews and ratings as it might prove to be a fault in your business.
author: Md Mahbub A.
pros: Generate better content in less time. Those who used scalenut AI can relate the similar framework with this tool. Peppertype offers almost the same frameworks like scalenut but in more affordable price. Frankly speaking, although the output isn't very similar to scalenut AI since its more aged than peppertype but if you do research of the developers and company then you will surely invest some bulks for peppertype. It's a good tool which is being updated constantly from the dev's end so it might be really powerful withing 1yr i hope. If you are a marketer or a content writer that needs support for writing then you can choose peppertype tool as second backup. There are some offers as LTD is available on some sites you can grab the deals.
cons: The output of the tool is somewhat not up to the mark in some frameworks. Hopefully, their respective support team forwarded the issue and really working at full pace to fix things up! Peppertype is a hybrid of automated and human content, which is why it is hard to predict its effectiveness. The content created by such tools are not entirely relevant, and will not fulfill the purpose the client expects it to. In addition, the content is not up to the mark in terms of quality. A human writer has a consciousness of a human reader and is able to generate relevant and useful content. However, this is not the case with Peppertype, and it might create content that is useless for the reader.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent AI Writer
author: Maria S.
pros: 1) Excellent output quality - This speaks of how well the people behind PepperType have trained its AI. Investing on training means hours and hours of human power that translates to investment of money. 2) Generous offer for the price - I can't complain about what I get under Tier 3. They offer 70K - up by 20K from the original 50K in response to requests - words per month, not just characters. At least for my own use, that's more than enough. 3) Solid organization behind it - I visited PepperType's website and devoured every important piece of information that i needed, which PepperType has clearly summed up in their FAQ: - a product by Pepper Content which is a Content Marketplace with over 1000+ customers including the likes of Amazon, Facebook, Adobe, - over 45,000+ content creators in text, graphic, and video across all languages - global and local. - raised a total of $4.5M in funding in the last 2 years. I am confident that PepperType is here to stay, and my investment won't be in vain. 4) Promising road map - There are many more features to look forward to, which I'm in no hurry to be served until after the other use cases have fully matured. I prefer quality rather than quantity; however, with how PepperType is going, having both on equal footing is not far in sight. 5) Customer responsiveness - PepperType is listening to Sumoling's requests as reflected on immediate changes to word count. Thanks for this! On a personal note, response to my support ticket took
cons: I look forward to the fiction writing component of Peppertype to cater to my artistic need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good AI tool to create contents fast for your audience
description: Overall a very good software especially for begineers who want to create an online presence through their blogs or post and attract audience. This can be a quick strting tool for them
author: Khan Nida Khanum A.
pros: It is a very good tool that uses AI to create headings, descriptions for your content that attracts audience. It is simple to use. You just have to enter the keywords and peppertype will generate the full description or heading for it. You get to choose from lot of options for which you will like to generate the contents like description of product, Facebook post, blog posts etc
cons: The features are good but the pricing is high. For multiple users the plan starts from 199$ per month which is very expensive. You have 1 user plan too for $45 dollar. But most of the time you need content that is manged by multiple users
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Excellent AI Writing software, one of the best for short form content generation
description: Overall, I'm satisfied with Peppertype. It serves most of my use cases. There is little to no learning curve and I could start using the tool without watching a single tutorial video.
author: Nilayan G.
pros: 1. The short-form content generated by Peppertype is outstanding. It is by far one of the best in my experience. 2. The long-form content generated was very good too and I could use it without much editing in most cases. 3. The user interface is clean and very simple to my liking. I like the pleasant colour scheme. The experience is distraction-free. 4. Quora answers is a nice feature that many competitor tools do not offer.
cons: 1. The tool lacks a native editor as of now. So, we need to copy the content generated from different places and paste them in an external editor for writing an article. 2. There was some confusion regarding the long-form and short-form content types that have been cleared by the team. However, most of the regularly used content types for my use cases fall under long-form which has a cap on the number of words (in the Lifetime deal). For a lot of people, this might be an issue. 3. The usage stats do not show the actual usage under long-form and short-form separately. The team has confirmed that it will be corrected soon. Until then, it is inconvenient as users won't know how much of the long-form quota they have consumed. 4. Different content types could be better organised on the home page. For example, all the content types that specifically serve the creation of blog posts could be kept together in one place. Yes, there is a filter at the top to achieve that. However, even when you select "All", the relevant tiles should be together. 5. The tool itself is pretty quick to load, however, there have been instances when the "loading" circle keeps on rolling and I have to reload the page. A few other users have also raised this issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Top notch AI content tool, you'll be surprised
author: Jérémy F.
pros: The quality of generated content is top-notch. I was genuinely surprised and impressed with this: I had tried a number of content generator tools in the past, but they were very lacking in quality: it seemed like they just produced longer synonyms for my inputs, or straight out copied content from other websites. Peppertype doesn't. It creates original content. Even better, the tools seem to understand your intent, and propose you with ideas and possibilities you hadn't necessarily envisioned, but that will make your content better — which of course means happier readers, more conversions, etc. It may not be a "one-click-and-done" content factory, simply because that's unrealistic (it cannot know/decide for you what you want to write about or what which angle to choose), but it is an EXTREMELY helpful tool to assist you in your writing. It will allow you to gain a ton of time, present you with options you hadn’t considered, and get your creative fluids going. I, fact, I officially dubbed it my new writing wingman! It's also very handy for a LOT of use cases: emails, Facebook posts, titles, blog post ideas… plenty of choice there, and chances are, if you there's something you need to write, Peppertype has a tool dedicated to it.
cons: The tool is still young, and at times, it shows. What do I mean by that? Well, the UX could be made a bit smoother, some additions I'd personally like to see aren't implemented yet… But they're all being worked on. In fact, the team is very receptive to feedback and from what I've seen, the tool evolves rapidly. I'd go as far as saying this relative “youth” is an asset: by starting to use it now instead of holding out, you can lock in a great price (if you've ever passed on a similar tool before and regretted it once its price skyrocketed — *cough* Jarvis *cough cough* — you know what I'm talking about 😉). You can even influence the future of the tool by requesting features you'd personally like to see implemented. If that's not a good thing, I don't know what is!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: AI Writer with excellent output and unique use cases
description: Very positive experience with the Peppertype output. I cannot recall a single generated output being written as garbage. If an output was unusable to us, it was due to the generated output having a different context from our intent. Unlike some of the other AI writers we tried where output didn't read like real English, or sentences that are strangely formed. It was also more versatile than I originally anticipated, because Peppertype is a template-based writer I thought it could only be used for that. But they introduced Content Expander which could be used for any context. Like I posted in this review above, I even used it for a Birthday card, and it was surprisingly well written. I cannot say that Peppertype was my favorite AI writer I have used, but I can say that it ended up being used the most often.
author: Wilson I.
pros: The output quality is among the best of the GPT3 writers I have tried or used in the past year, and I have tried a lot of them. There are a lot of templates, each for different purposes; some are more helpful than others. The most unique one of the bunch was Content Expander, which I think is badly named because it doesn't explain what it actually does. This tool writes any topic you give it so it isn't bound by the templates. I have, for example, used this to help me write a Birthday card to a sister-in-law living in a different country, and the AI was able to generate something very high quality with, with the details taken into the context.
cons: Organization of saved past data isn't well thought out. There are so search functions for past data so we have to dig for them. And the way the data is saved too is unintuitive; it is saved by keywords, so if I had an entry with a very specific long tail keyword, it would be its own entry. I would rather have a project based system where I can put different (but related) keywords together as a project.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best AI Content Solution out there!
author: Advait D.
pros: Peppertype.ai is an artificial intelligence based solution which creates high quality content for businesses. This tool provides a great way to come up with content for your website and social media campaigns. Peppertype is a very easy tool to use. The tool can be used in the browser and you can start within a few minutes. The tool basically asks you for your product and a few keywords. Based on this information, it provides you with a list of ideas and phrases. Overall, I think this is a great tool to help you come up with content ideas, inspiration for the content and original references for the content. It can give you a great starting point to create your own content. It is a great solution for online marketing teams, freelancers, professionals to eliminate writer's block and get inspired by better content creation for ad copies, landing pages, search engines, social ads and creatives. It generates content which gives you the inspiration to get that creative juice flowing. It is easy to use and time saving. It helps you with ideation and eliminates writer's block. The best part is that it is affordable.
cons: The Artificial Algorithm can get better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Peppertype AI content writing software review
description: I have used the free version before and I purchased an Appsumo lifetime deal. It came with a 30000 word limit per month. It is pretty good to use for urgent content generation. I will rate it 3 to 4 out of 5 stars.
author: Naga N.
pros: It can generate good PAS and AIDA content. It is my favorite part of the tool as it helps to generate engaging social media posts easily. The content expander tool, Blog intro, and conclusion, content rewriting tool are quite useful. The Blog ideas, outline, and expander tools are also good.
cons: The content generated sometimes has high plagiarism. It is good to get ideas and rewrite them in our own words. Sometimes, the content generated is quite long, more than 10 sentences and sometimes we cannot get more than 2 to 3 sentences. I am not able to figure out exactly this happens.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A good product at a very affordable price point.
description: It's good for content creation and getting you started. It certainly cuts down on content creation even if you have to do a bit of editing.
author: Brian W.
pros: Content is the foundation of any online marketing strategy. Without it, you'll have a hard time attracting customers and converting them into paying customers.The problem with content creation is that it takes too much time to create high-quality pieces of text for your website or blog posts. Good copywriters are expensive, and they're in short supply on the market right now. Peppertype solves this by using artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms to generate content for you at an affordable price point. Their AI technology has been trained on millions of articles from thousands of sources across the web so that we can produce original copy that reads like something written by a human being but without all the fluff and filler used by many other companies in their product descriptions or blog posts.
cons: Sometimes the results make no sense but I presume that this is all part of the learning process, It might also be down to my user inputs.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Creating content becomes easy...
author: Yanick T.
pros: Peppertype helps me create content for my email marketing operations. It's a great tool that generates textual data with the help of keywords. Peppertype makes text editing easy.
cons: The result is very often not perfect, it is necessary from time to time to make adjustments.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Masego Hlongwa Peppertype review
description: Peppertype has saved me a lot of time that I used to spend on research reading a dozen articles for my content, it has made life better I am able to focus more on growing my agency.
author: Masego H.
pros: It is easy to use, the content is fire it saves me a lot of time.
cons: The pricing, for countries like South Africa $25 a month is a bit too much, maybe to a yearly subscription that is cheaper than what you currently have.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A must have tool for content writing
description: I'm really happy using this tool as it cuts my writing time by ten folds. I used to finish a few articles in a week, but after playing with this tool for few months. I have noticed that I can finished 5 articles in a day without sweating out. How awesome is that?
author: Vinson L.
pros: What I love about Peppertype is the ability to curate topics, blog outline, generate introduction and blog outline with just a few clicks. This can be done in a matter of a seconds, you just need to provide the gist or summary of what content you want to get inside the tool. Once you have generated all the pieces of your content, you can expand this short paragraphs using the content expander and with just a few tweaks you can have an informative content that is unique and of high quality.
cons: The process to write a long form content needs to be done by batches using each separate content creator tool. Hope the team can streamline the process as I bought the tool for this main purpose.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent AI Writer with Outstanding Output
description: I love the way that it creates SEO meta descriptions for me and even provides keywords suggestions. It gives me ideas for writing, creates content for my blog and helps me create product descriptions for my eCommerce clients. I have so much more time on my hands thanks to this amazing AI writer.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I'm a digital agency owner and I struggle with being able to come up with blog ideas and writing. Peppertype.ai is a writer that takes care of that for me. I can easily write and schedule blogs, articles, and press releases to my clients.
cons: The word limits per month can be a bit restrictive for my level of usage.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very good tool
description: Peppertype is a very good tool that gives me a lot of ideas that I would otherwise only have come up with after a long thought. I bought Tier 3 and I am very happy with it. Ideas for headlines, subheadlines, bullets, blogs and much more helps anyone who wants to be successful on the Internet. Even for the German language I get very good results with Peppertype.
author: Wilfried B.
pros: I get very good suggestions, which I can use. I never thought that I get such good Ideas for i. e. Social Media Post Captions, Tweet Ideas, AIDA, Compelling Bullet Poins and so on.
cons: Limitation: There is a limitation on words I can use monthly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
